data.content: Added parseAgentDisplayParts() to agent-identity.ts that returns structured {label, pills} for agents. Created AgentDisplayLabel component rendering label text + Badge pills. Claude/Codex/Gemini agents get a 'cli' pill. OpenCode agents parse model paths like /openrouter/mistral/devstral-2512 into 'Mistral Devstral 2512' with 'openrouter' and 'cli' pills. Updated settings-agents-section, settings-actions-section, settings-pools-section, settings-dispatch-global-swap to use AgentDisplayLabel. All quality gates pass (lint, tsc, 1936 tests, build). Pushed to main as 3f1f81f1.
